_comment: Per-capture-session redaction map. Copy to redaction_map.json and fill in.
Keys are real values pulled from your local Whistle dump that MUST be replaced.
Values are the placeholder strings that will appear in the published rows/docs.
1. Capture a fresh kiro / anthropic session into crack/.../raw/*.json.
3. Open the raw dump, identify tokens/UUIDs/secrets, add them as key→placeholder.
4. python3 crack/scripts/sanitize.py  (idempotent; refuses to run without map).
5. crack/scripts/redaction_map.json is gitignored — never commit it.
